condition: No discrete signed path topology or branch-level mass balance exists.
reason: Do not implement a signed junction network from local face-level reverse flow alone.

condition: An entire modeled branch or junction path has reproducible negative net mdot.
reason: Exchange-cell mode represents local exchange with net throughflow not discrete path reversal.

condition: RAF RMF and SVF are all below TAMU-calibrated low-recirculation tolerances and pressure/thermal gates pass.
reason: Do not add an exchange cell where one bulk state is adequate.

condition: V_recirc cannot be tied to a coherent CFD region or volume mask.
reason: The model cannot define T_recirc residence time or stored/exchanged energy.

condition: mdot_exchange is missing or not conservative across the main-stream/cell interface.
reason: The cell energy equation cannot close without invented exchange.

condition: q_ref or mdot_exchange denominator is near zero or cancellation-dominated.
reason: Return status rather than extreme K_eff or residence time.

condition: static p p_rgh hydrostatic kinetic or sign-basis fields are missing.
T_main T_recirc property mode or wall/source terms are missing.
same-QOI mesh/time uncertainty is missing for regime metrics or residual targets.
reason: No coefficient or switching threshold admission without uncertainty.

condition: The design uses held-out CFD mdot realized wallHeatFlux or validation temperatures as runtime inputs.
Pressure or thermal residual is absorbed into a global friction heat-transfer or Nu multiplier.
reason: Contradicts AGENT-467 and two-tap section-effective guardrails.

condition: Current dry residual is labeled ordinary Nu f_D component_K F6 or admitted exchange coefficient.
reason: This package defines an interface only and admits no coefficients.
